key_insight: GeoSD improves reasoning generalization by dampening overconfident self-distillation updates and constraining prediction drift in the same probability geometry as next-token outputs.
engineering_relevance: For LLM post-training, it offers a practical way to keep in-distribution gains from self-distillation while reducing OOD failure modes on mathematical reasoning tasks.
method: Uses a Hellinger loss to downweight teacher targets the student cannot yet support.
Adds a proximal Fisher-Rao regularization term to limit drift from a recent checkpoint.
Applies natural-gradient-style updates in distribution space rather than plain parameter space.
evidence_signal: Across mathematical reasoning benchmarks and three model families, GeoSD improves average OOD accuracy by 5.7-8.6 points over the base model, with gains reported from 1.7B to 32B models.
watch_item: The method adds geometric regularization and checkpoint-dependent proximal control, which may increase training complexity and sensitivity to distance estimates or update scheduling.
